sources: d:/Drawing for ythe project/map project - done.svg
notes: Each entry below is missing a real door object in navigation_graph_recreated.json.
Fill corridorNodeId and point, then copy the doorTemplate into floors.<floor>.doors and keep the matching room doorId.
SuggestedType is a safe default. Change it for rooms that are actually computer labs, bathrooms, prayer rooms, health services, stationery, or other special spaces.
The extracted labels section comes from named sign groups in the source SVG drawing. Exact room-code mapping still needs manual confirmation on the map.

drawingLabelsExtracted.note: Source drawing id is spelled staionery_sign.
